actions.name: 事_公司名称
actions.caption: 事_公司名称

fields.caption: 客户编号
fields.output: 客户拜访.拜访名单.客户编号

fields.caption: 贸易国别

actions.expression:
SELECT kh.kh_id,
       kh.country,
       kh.khly,
       kh.khlx,
       kh.syms
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.company_name=[客户拜访.拜访名单.公司名称]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 事_登记人
actions.caption: 事_登记人
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.bm,
       ywrybiao.ydhm,
       ywrybiao.lxdh,
       ywrybiao.bmjl,
       ywrybiao.jldh,
       ywrybiao.sjdh
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[客户拜访.登 记 人]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 客户拜访.费用合计

actions.expression: [客户拜访.机票合计]+[客户拜访.酒店合计]+[客户拜访.交通合计]+[客户拜访.餐饮合计]+[客户拜访.其它合计]

actions.expression: [客户拜访.拜访费用.机票费用]+[客户拜访.拜访费用.酒店费用]+[客户拜访.拜访费用.交通费用]+[客户拜访.拜访费用.餐饮费用]+[客户拜访.拜访费用.其它费用]

view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
 or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

SELECT mygb.mygb
FROM mygb
ORDER BY mygb.mygb ASC

SELECT khly.khly
FROM khly
ORDER BY khly.khly ASC

SELECT khlx.khlx
FROM khlx
ORDER BY khlx.khlx ASC

SELECT syms.mc
FROM syms
ORDER BY syms.mc ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   (khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
 or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)

SELECT mygb.mygb
FROM mygb
ORDER BY mygb.mygb ASC

SELECT khly.khly
FROM khly
ORDER BY khly.khly ASC

SELECT khlx.khlx
FROM khlx
ORDER BY khlx.khlx ASC

SELECT syms.mc
FROM syms
ORDER BY syms.mc ASC
